title: GROUP_CONCAT prematurely truncates with UNION
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), description TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t2 (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'Test', repeat('x', 600)), (2, 'Sample', repeat('y', 700));
SELECT id, STRING_AGG(name, ', ') AS concatenated_names FROM t2 GROUP BY id;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, STRING_AGG(description, ', ') AS concatenated_descriptions FROM t2 GROUP BY id) AS a1 UNION SELECT 3, 'Extra data';
key_bug_features: GROUP_CONCAT truncates when used with UNION
